title: crataegus cuneifolia
intro: Crataegus cuneifolia, also known as the wedge-leaf hawthorn, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, known for its ability to support cardiovascular health and its potential to help lower blood pressure due to its antioxidant and vasodilatory properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving lipid profiles, and providing antioxidant protection, making it a popular ingredient in herbal preparations. Crataegus cuneifolia is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in capsule or tablet form, to support overall cardiovascular well-being and reduce the risk of heart disease.
